scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.build: tsc && mkdir -p dist/modules/event dist/modules/registration dist/modules/checkin dist/modules/feedback dist/modules/eligibility dist/modules/audit dist/modules/user dist/idempotency && cp src/modules/event/schema.sql dist/modules/event/ && cp src/modules/registration/schema.sql dist/modules/registration/ && cp src/modules/checkin/schema.sql dist/modules/checkin/ && cp src/modules/feedback/schema.sql dist/modules/feedback/ && cp src/modules/eligibility/schema.sql dist/modules/eligibility/ && cp src/modules/audit/schema.sql dist/modules/audit/ && cp src/modules/user/schema.sql dist/modules/user/ && cp src/idempotency/schema.sql dist/idempotency/
